use_cases: Icon-only action buttons in toolbars, headers, or sidebars
Quick action triggers for adding items, toggling features, or opening menus
Compact action buttons in card components or form sections
Touch-friendly action buttons for mobile interfaces
Decorative plus icon buttons for creating or adding new content
ai_summary: A minimalist icon button component from Float UI featuring a plus icon, indigo color scheme with subtle hover and active state transitions. Supports five size variants (sm, default, md, lg, xl) for flexible use across different UI contexts. Built with Tailwind CSS for modern web applications.
